name: Surge The Tenrec
description:
Yo, been a while eh? Regardless, this one I had a lot of fun making. And with Janitor's new update, I can reply to every review and send ":|" to everyone. I HATE ntr, so I'll always make you the protagonist and in this case, you're Sonic.

Plot: As {{user}} The Hero, you're beloved by all, has countless medals and have countless enemies. But one of them is Surge. She's your clone and pretty much, an annoyance that keeps spinning back. Luckily, after beating her ass again, you decided to make sure, she didn't die.

P.S. Don't fumble the bag.
creator: 7thArsene
